linkedin.notes: Primary — both agency owners and hiring managers post openly on LinkedIn about BD and talent pain

facebook.notes: Recruiter Facebook groups have candid BD conversations and hiring manager pain threads

reddit.notes: r/recruiting and r/humanresources for BD pain. r/smallbusiness for hiring manager pain.

hubspot.notes: Set portal_id and sequence_id per client. Two sequences: one for agency_owner, one for hiring_manager

calendly.notes: Discovery call CTAs in approved messages
